title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models from Python.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers via fetch.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLMs or chat models in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; manage models & chat in browser.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem to interact with the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI for chatting with Ollama models, history, syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into inline code copilots.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and model auto-pull.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM features.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + ChromaDB + LangChain to chat over documents.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers users via Ollama models with slash commands.

title: ollama-nest
summary: NestJS module wrapping the Ollama REST API for injection into services/controllers.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Lightweight Rust crate for Ollama with serde types and streaming support.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir client for Ollama with GenServer-backed process pooling and streaming.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot server that streams Ollama replies into threads with rate limiting.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts via Ollama inside notes with templating.
